name: Chicken Pasta Hot Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. In a large saucepan, melt butter. Stir in flour and salt. Blend in milk. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.
3. Add cheese; stir until melted.
4. Combine pasta, cheese sauce and chicken. Mix well.
5. Pour into 3 quart casserole. Top with cornflake crumbs.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until hot, about 30 minutes.
